name: chactgpt-图片生成
description:
基于非Ads基线流程，仅首节点切换Ads并支持浏览器实例参数

支持可选参考图：sourceImageUrl（单张）/ sourceImageUrls（多张，JSON 数组或逗号分隔）。

params.targetSelector: form:has(#prompt-textarea), #prompt-textarea, div#prompt-textarea[contenteditable="true"], textarea[placeholder*="Message" i], textarea[placeholder*="询问"], textarea[placeholder*="发送"]
params.openUploaderSelector: [data-testid="composer-plus-btn"], button[aria-label*="Attach" i], button[aria-label*="Upload" i], button[aria-label*="Add photos" i], button[aria-label*="Add files" i], button[aria-label*="上传"], button[aria-label*="附加"], button[aria-label*="添加"]
params.attachIndicatorSelector: [data-testid*="attachment"], [data-testid*="file"], [aria-label*="Remove attachment" i], [aria-label*="Remove file" i], [aria-label*="Remove image" i], [aria-label*="移除"], [aria-label*="删除"], img[alt*="Uploaded" i], img[src^="blob:"], form img, [data-testid*="composer" i] img

params.selector: #prompt-textarea, div#prompt-textarea[contenteditable="true"], textarea[placeholder*="Message" i], textarea[placeholder*="询问"], textarea[placeholder*="发送"]
params.autoEnterPollUntilSelector: button[data-testid="stop-button"], button[aria-label*="Stop" i], button[aria-label*="停止"], button:has-text("Stop"), button:has-text("停止")

params.fallbackImageSelector: img[alt*="Generated image" i], article img[src*="/backend-api/estuary/content"], main img[src*="/backend-api/estuary/content"], article img[src^="blob:"], article img[src^="data:image"], main img[src^="blob:"], main img[src^="data:image"], article img, main img, [data-testid*="image"] img, img[src*="/backend-api/estuary/content"], img[src^="blob:"], img[src^="data:image"]
params.downloadButtonSelector: button[aria-label*="Download" i], a[aria-label*="Download" i], button[aria-label*="下载"], a[aria-label*="下载"], button:has-text("Download"), button:has-text("下载"), a[download]
params.waitImageReadySelector: img[alt*="Generated image" i], img[src*="/backend-api/estuary/content"], article img, main img, [data-testid*="image"] img
params.copyImageButtonSelector: button[aria-label*="Copy image" i], button[aria-label*="复制图片"], button:has-text("Copy image"), button:has-text("复制图片")

params.selector: #app-root > main > side-navigation-v2 > bard-sidenav-container > bard-sidenav-content > div.content-wrapper > div > div > chat-window > div > input-container > fieldset > input-area-v2 > div > div > div.trailing-actions-wrapper.ng-tns-c1819427631-6 > div.input-buttons-wrapper-bottom.ng-tns-c1819427631-6 > div.mat-mdc-tooltip-trigger.send-button-container.ng-tns-c1819427631-6.inner.ng-star-inserted.visible > button > mat-icon, button[aria-label="Submit"], button[aria-label*="Submit" i]

waitAfter.selector: #model-response-message-contentr_b005ae4b34e346f5 > p > div > response-element > generated-image > single-image > div > div > div > download-generated-image-button > button > span.mdc-button__label > div
